canonical_name: Linker for activation of T cells
step_rationale: GPVI-mediated platelet signaling adapter; links collagen engagement to activation.
mechanism: LAT mediates downstream signaling from GPVI collagen receptor, propagating platelet activation and adhesion to exposed subendothelial matrix.

references.title: Plant-based Food Cyanidin-3-Glucoside Modulates Human Platelet Glycoprotein VI Signaling and Inhibits Platelet Activation and Thrombus Formation.
